article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.15. CR - Commercial Hauling of Recyclable Materials 2026-01-27.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $240,000 contract renewal for recyclable materials hauling in Burnaby
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on renewing a contract with GFL Environmental Inc. to haul recyclable materials from City facilities to an approved recycling facility. The proposed one-year renewal would run from February 1, 2026 to January 31, 2027, at an estimated cost of $240,000 including taxes.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — this could affect waste hauling services at Burnaby facilities.

key_dates.label: Burnaby recyclable materials hauling contract renewal period starts
Burnaby recyclable materials hauling contract renewal period ends
